rulings.Case Title: RUTH YAGER VS. AGCO CORPORATION,INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 21, 2007. LINE .3 DEFENDANT LESLIE CONTROLS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. = (302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: RUTH YAGER VS. AGCO CORPORATION,INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 21, 2007. LINE .3 DEFENDANT KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF USED DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT. THE MARTIN DECLARATION DOES NOT NEGATE PLAINTIFF'S ABILITY TO PROVE THE CASE. PACO WAS NOT EXPLORED IN PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION. THE FACT THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT HAVE STORES IN WASHINGTON DOES NOT NEGATE PLAINTIFF'S ABILITY TO PROVE THE PRODUCT WAS PURCHASED AT A STORE OTHER THAN DEFENDANT'S STORE. THERE ALSO WOULD BE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT AS TO WHETHER THE BAGS PURCHASED BY PLAINTIFF WERE DEFENDANT'S BAGS. = (302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: WOLLBORG/MICHELSON PERSONNEL SERVICE INC VS. EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 21, 2007. LINE 9. PLAINTIFF WOLLBORG/MICHELSON PERSONNEL SERVICE INC.'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S SECOND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE REGARDING STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS FOR UNCERTAINTY; DEFENDANT MUST SPELL OUT WHICH STATUTES OF LIMITATIONS APPLY TO WHICH CAUSES OF ACTION. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S FIFTH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE FOR FAILURE TO STATE SUFFICIENT FACTS FOR LACHES. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT'S 3,4,6-11TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BECAUSE THEY VIOLATE THE REQUIREMENT UNDER CCP 431.30(g) TO REFER TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION WHICH THEY ARE INTENDED TO ANSWER OR (IF COURT BELIEVES THAT DEFENDANT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES MET THE REQUIREMENTS UNDER CCP 431.30(g)). SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO THE 3-8,10,11,16,17TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES FOR FAILURE TO STATE SUFFICIENT FACTS. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PLAINTIFF'S DEMURRER TO THE 12TH-15TH AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES(RELATING TO ATTORNEY'S FEES AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES). THESE DEFENSES SHOULD BE RAISED BY A MOTION TO STRIKE. = (302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: MARK FREEMAN VS. ARTHUR J.GALLAGER & CO INSURANCE BROKERS OF et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 21, 2007. LINE 10. DEFENDANT ARTHUR J.GALLAGER & CO. INSURANCE BROKERS' OF DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE EXECUTIVE AGREEMENT DOES NOT ADDRESS ALL THE TERMS OF EMPLOYMENT. THE TERMS IN PARAGRAPH 12 ARE NOT FREE FROM AMBIGUITY; THE ALLEGED FAILURE TO PAY SEVERANCE IS A SUFFICIENT BASIS TO ALLEGE A BREACH OF THE IMPLIED COVENANT; FRAUD HAS BEEN PLED IN THAT PLAINTIFF WAS INDUCED TO LEAVE HIS PRIOR JOB BASED ON DEFENDANT'S PROMISES UPON WHICH HE REASONABLY RELIED. = (302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: MARK FREEMAN VS. ARTHUR J.GALLAGER & CO INSURANCE BROKERS OF et al
